notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The description only links to the full recipe, so this is intentionally an incomplete fallback case.
Accepted after general separation of leading hashtags from a concise same-line title; no creator, sponsor, or exact recipe phrase is used.
